mapper.select: /* UserMainMapper.selectMainTopInfo */ SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{nowYearMonth} AND INOUT_TYPE = 'I' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS nowInAmount ,SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{nowYearMonth} AND INOUT_TYPE = 'E' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS nowExAmount ,SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{lastYearMonth} AND INOUT_TYPE = 'I' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS lastInAmount ,SUM(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{lastYearMonth} AND INOUT_TYPE = 'E' THEN AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS lastExAmount FROM TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND DATE_FORMAT(TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') BETWEEN #{lastYearMonth} AND #{nowYearMonth} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* UserMainMapper.selectMainCategoryList */ SELECT A.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName ,COALESCE(SUM(B.AMOUNT), 0) AS totalAmount FROM CATEGORY_CODE A LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO B ON A.CATEGORY_CODE = B.CATEGORY_CODE AND B.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND B.INOUT_TYPE = 'E' AND DATE_FORMAT(B.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{nowYearMonth} AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.CATEGORY_CODE ORDER BY A.CATEGORY_CODE

/* UserMainMapper.selectMainSpendingList */ SELECT A.YEAR_MONTH AS yearMonth ,COALESCE(SUM(B.AMOUNT), 0) AS totalAmount FROM DUMMY_DATE A LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO B ON A.YEAR_MONTH = DATE_FORMAT(B.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') AND B.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND B.INOUT_TYPE = 'E' AND B.OVER_SPENDING_YN = 'Y' AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.YEAR_MONTH = #{nowYearMonth} GROUP BY A.YEAR_MONTH ORDER BY A.YEAR_MONTH

/* UserMainMapper.selectMainAccountAmountList */ SELECT CASE WHEN A.AI_SE = 'B' THEN '통장' ELSE '카드' END AS aiSe ,A.AI_NM AS aiNm ,SUM(CASE WHEN B.INOUT_TYPE = 'I' THEN B.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS inAmount ,SUM(CASE WHEN B.INOUT_TYPE = 'E' THEN B.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END) AS exAmount FROM TB_ACCOUNT_INFO A LEFT JOIN TB_HOME_LEDGER_INFO B ON A.MEMBER_ID = B.MEMBER_ID AND A.AI_SEQ = B.AI_SEQ AND DATE_FORMAT(B.TRAN_DATE, '%Y-%m') = #{nowYearMonth} AND B.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE A.MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.AI_SEQ ORDER BY A.AI_SEQ

/* UserMainMapper.selectSavingGoalLate */ SELECT SUM(SI_TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS siTotalAmount ,SUM((MONTHLY_PAYMENT_AMOUNT * PAY_CNT)) AS payAmount ,MAX(END_DE) AS endDe FROM TB_SAVING_INFO WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
